category_sources: source_facts.description says ISO-C API and CLI for generating UUIDs; official OSSP homepage is for the lib/uuid package.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ossp-uuid; source_facts.homepage is the official OSSP uuid package page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official OSSP uuid package page; no separate official docs surface was identified, so the official package page is the best documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OSSP package page/source facts do not provide a source-control repository URL, and Debian/source mirrors were rejected as non-official repositories.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an ISO-C API and CLI for UUID generation; source_facts.executables lists uuid and uuid-config.
